_comment: EMC drug-target list that drives the systematic target->drug enumeration (enumerate-drugs.mjs). Each target maps to a documented EMC vulnerability; sourceId values resolve to the citation map in build-candidates.mjs. Genes use HGNC symbols (for DGIdb) and Ensembl IDs (for Open Targets, optional).

targets.role: KIT exon-11 mutation in a minority; CD117/KIT expressed in ~half of EMC
VEGFR2 - angiogenesis axis; target of pazopanib/sunitinib/anlotinib (the most active EMC systemic class)
VEGFR1 - angiogenesis axis measured in metastatic EMC
VEGFR3 - lymphangiogenesis/angiogenesis axis measured in EMC
RET kinase - sunitinib target measured in EMC
MET receptor - elevated in sarcomas; cabozantinib (VEGF+MET) rationale
